_meta.status: Decoded moving-enemy spawn streams and shared formation descriptor table from unpacked EXE data.
_meta.record_format: trigger u16; descriptor_ptr u16 (or marker FFFF then descriptor_ptr); base_x u16; base_y s16
_meta.descriptor_format: field_14 u16; field_0A u16; behavior u16; count u16; count × (dx s16, dy s16)
_meta.descriptor_pointer_raw_mapping: raw_descriptor_offset = descriptor_ptr + 0x6521 in this unpacked EXE artifact
_meta.row_mapping_inference: approx_canonical_row = 288 - trigger; strongly supported by the LEV1 blue 0x2D formation (trigger 130 -> row 158, matching the user's c160-ish screenshot section), but still treated as inferred.

confirmed_LEV1_blue_formation.runtime_dump_match: Matches runtime object dump A14/A15/A16/A17 x positions 64/80/112/128.
